next_steps: Perform PCR testing for Leptospira species (blood and urine)
Check peripheral blood smear for intraerythrocytic organisms (Babesia)
Perform PCR testing for Anaplasma phagocytophilum and Babesia microti
Obtain ADAMTS13 level to rule out thrombotic thrombocytopenic purpura
Monitor fluid status, electrolytes, and renal function in an ICU setting
Consider supportive management including renal replacement therapy if indicated by metabolic status
